νικητής, ου, ὁ in a misreading of AcPl Ox 1602, verso 30; s. μένω 1b.—DELG s.v. νίκη.

AcPl Ox 1602 AcPl Ox 1602 = Acts of Paul, POxy 1602—List 1

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)
